arts.ttl: Tuesday's Championship predictions including Middlesbrough vs. West Brom
arts.sum: Sports Mole provides score predictions and previews for all of today's Championship fixtures, including Middlesbrough vs. West Brom.

arts.ttl: Michael Carrick rejects 'leaders' notion as Middlesbrough struggle with game management
arts.sum: Asked if it's fair to say Boro's squad lacks leaders and that's a contributing factor to their soft-centred nature at times this season, Carrick insisted: “I just think that’s quite an easy thing to say. It’s easy to talk about leaders and passion, but when the team hasn’t won, I just think that’s an easy thing to fall back on.

arts.ttl: I attended Tony Mowbray's West Brom unveiling and hung on every word of brutal account
arts.sum: Tony Mowbray's appointment as the Albion boss, for the second time in almost 20 years following the harrowing year the man himself has endured, is some story in itself, let alone the fact that he returns to boyhood club Middlesbrough on Tuesday evening for what promises to be an emotional reunion. Those dark days are behind the Mowbray family now, and normal service has resumed - he is now routinely three and a half hours away from their Middlesbrough home, although there'll be a sharp return back up the M1 on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough injury latest for West Brom with updates on Riley McGree and Anfernee Dijksteel
arts.sum: But with Boro hosting West Brom on Tuesday and then travelling to Preston North End on Saturday, head coach Michael Carrick has confirmed neither is expected to be back for those games. On top of that, Boro welcomed back Aidan Morris, Luke Ayling and Seny Dieng at the weekend.

arts.ttl: Tony Mowbray reveals what will change at West Brom after Carlos Corberan
arts.sum: Mowbray was unveiled at the club's training ground on Monday afternoon and was highly complimentary of predecessor Corberan, who left Albion for boyhood club Valencia on Christmas Eve. One criticism that was often aimed at the Spaniard, though, was that for all of his excellent coaching and how he set his team up, Corberan appeared to restrict his attacking players. Mowbray, whose Albion side in 2007-08 scored over 100 goals on their way to the Championship title and reached the FA Cup semi-finals, has by his own admission moulded his sides into more a generally more pragmatic style in the intervening period, learning lessons from spells at various clubs along the way.

arts.ttl: Middlesbrough Morgan Whittaker transfer interest as Plymouth Argyle star could be set to leave
arts.sum: Middlesbrough are interested in signing Plymouth Argyle star Morgan Whittaker this month, with the Pilgrims appearing ready to cash. As well as Doak, Boro have uncertainty over Emmanuel Latte Lath and while Whittaker would appear an unnatural replacement, they do have Marcus Forss and Delano Burgzorg who can play as centre-forwards in cover of Tommy Conway who is closing in on a return from injury.

arts.ttl: Ben Doak Liverpool loan clause detail that offers Middlesbrough extra comfort blanket
arts.sum: Middlesbrough have an extra comfort blanket with regard to a potential Ben Doak recall this month, with a deadline on the recall clause in Liverpool's favour falling before the end of the transfer window. There’s something in place that means it’s not to the end of the window with Ben, it’s not something that will run until then.

arts.ttl: West Brom buying player for €3m plus % of future capital gain
arts.sum: With Isaac Price on the verge of signing for West Bromwich Albion, the Belgian media continue to add little snippets about the ongoing transfer situation. Price moved to Standard Liege in 2023, having come to the end of his time with Everton.
